pi_items.metadata_value: Convert a color image to grayscale using GIMP's desaturate function
pi_items.verified_value: Task downloads colorful landscape or butterfly images from Unsplash and applies GIMP desaturate function. Two setup scripts exist with different images.
pi_items.source: Verified by: 1) Downloaded and analyzed actual Unsplash images from setup scripts, 2) Reviewed verifier.py which checks grayscale conversion, 3) Analyzed image properties showing successful conversion meets all criteria

pi_items.verified_value: Real, publicly accessible Unsplash image. Downloaded successfully. Dimensions: 1000x667 pixels. RGB color image with average saturation 0.301 and low channel correlation 0.919.
pi_items.source: HTTP download and PIL image analysis confirmed real accessible image

pi_items.verified_value: Real, publicly accessible Unsplash image. Downloaded successfully. Dimensions: 1000x751 pixels. RGB color image.
pi_items.source: HTTP download and PIL image analysis confirmed real accessible image

pi_items.metadata_value: Unsplash photo-1558818498-28c1e002b655 (butterfly image from alternate setup)
pi_items.verified_value: Real, publicly accessible Unsplash image. Downloaded successfully. Dimensions: 800x1200 pixels. RGB color image.
pi_items.source: HTTP download and PIL image analysis confirmed real accessible image

pi_items.metadata_value: Requires channel correlation ≥ 0.95 for grayscale success
pi_items.verified_value: Correct criterion for grayscale detection. Proper PIL.convert('L') produces correlation of 1.000 when converted back to RGB.
pi_items.source: Analyzed verifier.py lines 81, 188 and validated with PIL image conversion analysis

pi_items.verified_value: Correct criterion. Proper grayscale conversion produces saturation of 0.0 in HSV color space.
pi_items.source: Analyzed verifier.py lines 82, 193-195 and validated HSV saturation of properly converted grayscale images

pi_items.metadata_value: Requires RGB channel uniformity ≤ 15 for grayscale success
pi_items.verified_value: Correct criterion. Proper grayscale conversion produces 0.0 RGB difference (all channels identical).
pi_items.source: Analyzed verifier.py lines 84, 198-200 and validated RGB channel differences in grayscale images

pi_items.metadata_value: Requires ≥5% of pixels changed from original
pi_items.verified_value: Correct criterion. Sample colorful landscape converts to grayscale with 93.2% of pixels modified.
pi_items.source: Analyzed verifier.py lines 89-115 and validated pixel change percentages in desaturated images

pi_items.metadata_value: Requires 3 out of 4 criteria met to pass
pi_items.verified_value: Correctly implemented at line 209 of verifier.py: score >= 75 (3/4 = 75%)
Setup scripts create GIMP 2.10 configuration directories and install gimp package
pi_items.source: Analyzed setup_gimp.sh lines 14-18 showing .config/GIMP/2.10 directory creation

pi_items.verified_value: Correctly specified in task.json init.timeout_sec field
Correctly specified in task.json init.max_steps field

pi_items.metadata_value: Data source is real Unsplash images vs synthetic
pi_items.verified_value: Data is definitively NOT synthetic. All primary and fallback images are real, publicly accessible Unsplash photographs.
pi_items.source: Downloaded and analyzed actual Unsplash photos with HTTP requests. Verified they are accessible high-resolution images with genuine photographic content.

privileged_info_summary: The desaturate task uses real colorful images from Unsplash (landscape photo-1506905925346-21bda4d32df4 at 1000x667 RGB and butterfly photo-1558818498-28c1e002b655 at 800x1200 RGB) as input. The task requires agents to apply GIMP's desaturate filter within 90 seconds using at most 10 interaction steps. Verification is performed by checking: (1) RGB channel correlation ≥0.95, (2) HSV saturation ≤0.05, (3) RGB channel uniformity ≤15, and (4) ≥5% pixel modification. Success requires 3 of 4 criteria. Proper grayscale conversion passes all four criteria.
